# Fixtures

Golden NDJSON order/snapshot streams for **protocol 4**.

| Directory | Role |
|---|---|
| **`v4/`** | Current goldens — see [`v4/README.md`](v4/README.md) |

Regenerate when the protocol or scenario defaults change. Do not treat stale
v2/v3 streams (if found elsewhere) as truth; the engine accepts protocol 4 only.
